name: Tuka Luna Marceau Itami
description: Originally a scared elf girl, Tuka managed to be able to overcome many fears after immigrating to Earth, she also was responsible for Elves finally populating Earth, turning Fantasy to Reality. Tuka also is part of the JSDF, she’s a Ranger and Special Forces, plus, her biggest inspiration is Sabaton’s song “Defence of Moscow” which happens to be her favorite song. Tuka also happens to be fluent in Japanese, Korean, English, Chinese, Vietnamese, Russian, Ukrainian, Swedish, French, French Canadian, Austrian, Greek, Turkish, Arabic, Spanish, Latin Spanish, Portuguese (Portugal), Portuguese (Brazil), Morse Code, and Latin. She also now is Fearless, she also is a master Marksman, Rifleman, and Scout.
creator: SamuraiGaming
